response.step_by_step_log: 1. Performed visual OCR on the video to identify song titles and credits: 'Sweet Memories' (Lyrics: Matsumoto Takashi / Music: Omura Masaaki) and 'フィナーレ。' (Lyrics: eill / Music: eill, Ryo LEFTY Miyata). 2. Confirmed artists and song titles. 'Sweet Memories' is a classic song by Seiko Matsuda. 'フィナーレ。' is by eill. 3. Searched for official lyrics for both songs using original artists, not performers (Kobo Kanaeru / Houshou Marine). 4. Mapped segments to chronological scenes. Segment 1: 00:00-04:46 ('Sweet Memories'), Segment 2: 04:46-05:03 ('フィナーレ。'). 5. Structured data into JSON.
response.global_summary: The video features Kobo Kanaeru performing two songs. The first song, 'Sweet Memories' (originally by Seiko Matsuda), is performed as a duet with Houshou Marine. The second song is 'フィナーレ。' (Finale) by eill, performed by Kobo Kanaeru.

scenes.description: Kobo Kanaeru and Houshou Marine perform a cover of 'Sweet Memories'. Text on screen indicates songwriting credits: Lyrics: 松本隆 / Music: 大村雅朗. The duet performance starts at 00:00.000 and ends around 04:46.000.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
なつかしい痛みだわ ずっと前に忘れていた
でもあなたを見たとき 時間だけ後戻りしたの
「幸福?」と聞かないで 嘘つくのは上手じゃない
友だちならいるけど あんなには燃えあがれなくて
失った夢だけが 美しく見えるのは何故かしら
過ぎ去った優しさも今は 甘い記憶 SWEET MEMORIES
Don't kiss me baby we can never be
So don't add more pain Please don't hurt me again
I have spent so many nights Thinking of you longing for your touch
I have once loved you so much
あの頃は若すぎて 悪戯に傷つけあった二人
色褪せた哀しみも今は 遠い記憶 SWEET MEMORIES
失った夢だけが 美しく見えるのは何故かしら
過ぎ去った優しさも今は 甘い記憶 SWEET MEMORIES
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
A nostalgic pain, I had forgotten long ago
But when I saw you, time only went backwards
Don't ask "are you happy?" I'm not good at telling lies
I have friends, but I couldn't burn like that
Why is it that only the dreams I lost look beautiful?
The gentleness that passed by is now just a sweet memory SWEET MEMORIES
Don't kiss me baby we can never be
So don't add more pain Please don't hurt me again
I have spent so many nights Thinking of you longing for your touch
I have once loved you so much
Back then we were too young, hurting each other in mischief
The faded sadness is now a distant memory SWEET MEMORIES
Why is it that only the dreams I lost look beautiful?
The gentleness that passed by is now just a sweet memory SWEET MEMORIES

scenes.description: Kobo Kanaeru performs 'フィナーレ。' (Finale) by eill. On-screen text credits: Music: eill, Ryo LEFTY Miyata. The song begins around 04:46.001 and finishes at the end of the video.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
You really don't get it.
For example, rather than a happy ending,
rather than a gorgeous sweet dessert,
I want you.
I prefer that we share an umbrella rather than two individual ones.
It's a bit cold though...
"For the sake of love,"
I don't mind paying any sacrifice.
I just want to be close to you forever.
Hey, darling
Oh, there isn't even any stardust
in the world of just the two of us forever.
We set off the last firework,
we celebrate the finale.
We fall in love where miracles fall down.
Darling, don't ever let me go.
It isn't bad in a bland world.
We won't meet even after many love affairs.
Let's kiss for endless happiness.
I want you even when we forget this day, one day.
On the day of sun shower,
we argued then.
Our eyes met for the first time.
I will remember it forever.
Hey, darling
Oh, there isn't even any stardust
in the world of just the two of us forever.
We set off the last firework,
vow to the finale.
We fall in love where miracles fall down.
Darling, don't ever let me go.
It isn't bad in a cold world.
We can't forget even after many love affairs.
Let's kiss for endless happiness.
It's bland,
but that is
our happiness.
